title: Fix mobile app crash caused by Expo Router conflict and TypeScript error
description: The mobile app crashed on launch due to conflicting route patterns. Root causes: (1) Expo Router route conflict in cook-menu directory, (2) UIKit Input component TypeScript type error.

stories.title: Fix TypeScript type error in UIKit Input component
acceptanceCriteria: Input component style prop type changed from ViewStyle to TextStyle in apps/mobile/components/UIKit.tsx line 116
TypeScript compilation passes: cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit returns 0 errors
No other TypeScript errors introduced by the change

stories.title: Fix Expo Router conflicting route patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Keep directory structure apps/mobile/app/cook-menu/[id]/index.tsx and other files
Route pattern 'cook-menu/:id' now resolves to only one screen
No Expo Router 'conflicting screens' error on app launch

stories.title: Verify app launches without crash
acceptanceCriteria: App launches and shows landing screen without crash

stories.title: Rebuild and install APK with fixes
acceptanceCriteria: Deep clean performed (.expo, android/app/build, android/.gradle deleted)
APK builds successfully with both fixes applied
APK installs on device via adb
